weak_points.message: Class 'Company' has no identity (no identity_keys and no unique property) — instances cannot be deduplicated across documents.
Class 'Deal' has no identity (no identity_keys and no unique property) — instances cannot be deduplicated across documents.

Class 'Product' has no identity (no identity_keys and no unique property) — instances cannot be deduplicated across documents.
6 classes but no 'broader' hierarchy — consider an is-a taxonomy to enable subsumption.
Class 'Deal' is disconnected — give it a 'broader' parent or a relationship, or remove it.
Class 'Founder' is disconnected — give it a 'broader' parent or a relationship, or remove it.
Class 'Metric' is disconnected — give it a 'broader' parent or a relationship, or remove it.
Relationship 'CEO_OF' has an untyped endpoint (source/target = Any) — it constrains no traversal.
Class 'Company' has no definition (ISO 704 / FIBO require label + definition).
Class 'Deal' is disconnected — give it a 'broader' parent or a relationship, or remove it.
Class 'Person' has exactly one subclass — a single-child branch is usually under-modeled or redundant.
